candidate_definition_hints.text: Main public package repository for opam, the source package manager of OCaml.
This repository contains OCaml package and compiler metadata and is used by the default installation of [opam](https://opam.ocaml.org/).

candidate_glosses.text: This repository contains OCaml package and compiler metadata and is used by the default installation of [opam](https://opam.ocaml.org/).
